title: Is Mari Satan
wikitext:
[]: Is Mari Satan?             Quote Post by pir2confusion » Tue Sep 07, 2021 2:10 am First, in asking if and thinking about Mari is Satan I'm not claiming she is evil nor saying she is good, this is not a morality statement. This also isn't related to shipping of characters, Mari is the devil because you wanted one character to end up with another and didn't. This is in the context of the rebuild series she seems to be related in lots of key ways to Lucifer/The Devil/Satan/Venus some kind of fallen angel going against "the plan of god" for most of the series. If Mari is the devil I admit I don't understand what that means also without future eva media there isn't anything important about that revelation if it is true. Second, this isn't a deep dive on theology beyond what someone working on a movie and tv show might find doing basic research like read well known books or googled some things. I'm leaning on Devilman as a bigger source for lore compared to any real religious text. As I haven't read or watched that much from 1960s and 70s Japan I'm probably overlooking things or focusing too much on western art for understanding. Saying someone is the devil has a lot of baggage with it as well as mountains of stories that could all be brought into a discussion but I am not trying to bring up much that isn't shown in some capacity in the Rebuild series with one exception being Devilman. It is mentioned a lot as an influence of evangelion and I don't know how many people are familiar with it. Since this is an eva board probably people here have read it but I will put a brief summary behind a spoilers tag of what I remember. It is a 70s manga but it also has a newer netflix anime so don't click if you don't want the story ruined. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Is Mari Satan?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Sep 07, 2021 9:03 am I'm not sure I follow some of your examples, but the general throughline is certainly an interesting thought to entertain; I can't say for certain that this is the case, but it's definitely not to be dismissed out of hand. One thing I will say is that the difference between God and Satan is more clerical in nature in Eva than most other things, so while your scene-by-scene observations definitely have something to it, I don't think that Mari's existence opposes anything in the strictest sense here

[]: Re: Is Mari Satan?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Sep 08, 2021 11:05 pm This reminds me a lot of those theories claming she worked for Seele, through IPEA being a Seele front. Perhaps this was intended at some point, considering she had this vague association with Kaji at one point, as his "subordinate": post/402329/Rebuild-Evangelion-Chronicle/#402329

[]: Re: Is Mari Satan?             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Sep 09, 2021 6:10 am Considering that IPEA is the organization that most outwardly works against Seele, I don't see how that at any point could have been the intention. Plus, as I said, Satan imagery!=evil in NTE, so "she has things associating her with satan, therefore clearly she must be working for Seele!!!!1" is a painfully superficial reading
